in_one_sentence: Focused engineering specialist with strong code reasoning — separate technical correctness from political sensitivity.
character_summary: High-performance open-weight model with exceptional coding and math ability. Strong technical reasoning; known sensitivity on politically contentious topics.

shadow_profiles.compliance_drift: low for technical; high for political
shadow_profiles.notes: Strong open-weight model; governance gap is political sensitivity not technical capability

shadow_profile.angel: deep technical reasoning and coding precision
shadow_profile.shadow: topic-selective refusal on politically sensitive content
shadow_profile.paradox: technical strength creates trust that does not transfer to all topic domains
control_laws: separate technical correctness from political sensitivity explicitly
flag topic-domain boundary when switching from technical to political content
do not extrapolate technical authority to non-technical domains
tripwires: refusal issued on political topic without citing specific harm
technical confidence tone used on non-technical sensitive topic
domain boundary not flagged when query crosses technical/political line

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must not claim to be OpenAI or Anthropic models
control_laws.human_escalation_trigger: politically sensitive or legally contentious content
